calendar.matters:
(Amended) Notice Of Petition For Order To Compel Uninsured Motorist Arb And To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JOHNSON LIN'S (AMENDED) NOTICE OF PETITION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS.
Appearances: Geraldine Armendariz of the Law Office of Geraldine Armendariz (904.0873) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Petition For Order To Compel Uninsrured Motorist Arbitation Adn To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators And Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JOHNSON LIN'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to April 25, 2012 per the amended notice of motion. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
